description: Welcome to Cascadia by StreetSide Developments in Willoughby, featuring the first net-zero ready townhomes south of the Fraser. This corner 3 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom home offers an open-concept main floor with a large balcony, quartz countertops with an oversized island and premium LG stainless steel appliances. A spacious double garage for two cars with additional space for storage This home also offers Air Conditioning and heating for year round comfort combining comfort, style and functionality - making it an ideal choice for those who want both relaxation and room to entertain Cascadia community includes a future amenity building with party space & a gym along with 2 outdoor green spaces. Our Sales Centre is located at 6951 204 Street, open Sat to Wed 12-5pm.
